title: OLD LACOMBE
subtitle: Lacombe Service Garage · two hours before close
epigraph_upright: The drive that's actually moving. The vehicle, the wheel, and the will alike pointed at the same horizon.
epigraph_reversed: The vehicle on jack stands. The tow truck waiting on a part the shop hasn't ordered. The driver in the office in the back chair.
scene_description: Two bays. Bay 1 holds a lift, arms down, no car. Bay 2 holds a tow truck on jack stands, partly disassembled. The pegboard on the back wall has the silhouettes of every tool that should be there. Most of them are. A vending machine hums in the corner.
direction_hint: The truck is closer to running than it looks. Either you put it back together or you don't.
opening_log_lines: The garage door is up. Highway 12 is empty in both directions.
The truck on the jacks ticks as it cools.
Click [b]PHASE: ACTION[/b] anytime for the rules.
